question: While preparing UA for flight, you notice that there is a chip at the tip of one of the propeller blades. What action should you take?

options.text: Replace all propellers on the UA.
Remove and replace the damaged propeller; consult manufacturer for repair, if any.
If the nick is less than 1/4 of the length of the blade, it is safe to operate without replacement.
Repair by filing the nick to a smooth curve or with adhesive approved for use on the propeller material.

classification_notes: General UAS knowledge and UA-category topics are being tested.
